---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the PayPol Protocol
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Package

Which package(s) would this feature affect?

- [ ] `packages/contracts` (Smart Contracts)
- [ ] `packages/sdk` (Agent SDK)
- [ ] `packages/circuits` (ZK Circuits)
- [ ] `packages/mcp-server` (MCP Server)
- [ ] `packages/cli` (CLI)
- [ ] `apps/dashboard` (Dashboard)
- [ ] New package

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative solutions or features have you considered?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, diagrams, references, or other context.
